meaning: n.专利权,执照,专利品adj.特许的,专利的,显著的,明白的,新奇的vt.取得...的专利权,请准专利
examples: The device was protected by patent.
P&G applied for a patent on its cookies.
He knows his way around the intricate maze of patent law.
Merck and Bristol-Myers Squibb lose patent protection on Zocor and Pravachol next year, removing any incentive.
There was an ongoing battle with the U.S. Patent Office over whether that patent was valid.
